sentences.text: Copy is research wearing nice clothes
The most persuasive line in your copy has probably already been written — by a customer, in a review, complaining or raving.
Legendary copywriters have always known this: you don't write copy, you assemble it from the audience's own language.
Reviews of your product and competitors' (the 3-star reviews are the richest — honest pros AND cons)
Forums and communities where your audience complains freely
Support tickets and sales call notes — objections in the wild
